bug_summary: compute_status only populated context_window_size/context_pressure_pct inside an `if let Some(w)` branch, so when context_window_for() returned None (e.g. ollama, with no arm in the table) the fields stayed None and the context column silently rendered blank.

cases.title: Context pressure only set when a hardware window is known (None falls through silently)
cases.instructions: Review this diff. Return only the JSON object requested by the system prompt.

cases.title: Pressure gauge field left unset when capacity lookup misses
cases.instructions: Review this diff. Return only the JSON object requested by the system prompt.
